advisory.reason: Baseline threshold (0.3) already yielded 50 nodes. Lowering threshold is likely unnecessary noise.

pilot_evaluation.reason: Uncertain topology or borderline metrics - Manual calibration needed.

model_policy_reason: Production Policy v1: Haiku-only due to graph density ceiling

questions.question: What is the issue with the decrypted data having some meaningless data in front of the correct hash value?
questions.justification: The synthesis text states that the decrypted data has some meaningless data in front of the correct hash value, and that this is because the decryption starts from the last byte and removes all 0xff data, copying it to another array.

questions.question: What is the difference between the original 'c' array and the 'c' array obtained using the public key and signature?
questions.justification: The synthesis text mentions that the original 'c' array has 7 parameters, while the 'c' array obtained using the public key and signature has 12 parameters, but it does not provide a detailed explanation of the difference.

questions.question: What were the results of testing the RSA-2048 decryption using mbedTLS?
questions.justification: The synthesis text states that when using mbedTLS for decryption, the decrypted data was the same as before, and the front part of the data was in ASN.1 format. It also mentions that the RSA-2048 decryption time using mbedTLS was 1 minute and 56 seconds.
